title: True End - Endgame Progression Overhauled
description: This pack aims to increase the time it takes to beat the game by changing how you progress the game.
body:
![True End Title](https://i.imgur.com/RFLu5UD.png)

This pack aims to increase the time it takes to beat the game by changing how you progress the game.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Progression**

The first change you might notice is that eyes of ender are no longer craftable in the early game, instead you gain eyes by completing certain advancements. Eyes can also be duplicated with chorus fruit and blaze powder once you get to the end.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**FEATURES**

- You will spawn 3000 blocks away from the main end island
- Elytras will be at zero durability when found
- Eyes of Ender can only be destroyed in the void and despawning
- Eyes of Ender are obtainable from completing certain tasks and can be duplicated with chorus fruit and blaze powder
- Thrown Eyes of Ender will go straight into your inventory
- Respawn anchors are now usable in the end
- Giant phantoms roam the space between the main end island and the outer end islands
- Main and Leave gateways appear after defeating the dragon, allowing you to teleport from the main end island to the end spawn
- Main and Leave gateways have eternal beacons

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
